metadata.label: Titel
metadata.wrap:
key.wrap = <dt class="tx-dlf-title">|</dt>
value.ifEmpty.field = parentTitle
value.ifEmpty.wrap = [|]
value.required = 1
value.wrap = <dd class="tx-dlf-title">|</dd>

metadata.label: RISM
metadata.wrap:
key.wrap = <dt>|</dt>
value.setContentToCurrent = 1
value.required = 1
value.typolink.parameter {
                    current = 1
                    split {
                    token = -
                    returnKey = 2
                    }
                    rawUrlEncode = 1
                    prepend = TEXT
                    prepend.value = https://opac.rism.info/search?id=
                    append = TEXT
                    append.value = &View=rism
                    }
value.wrap = <dd>|</dd>

metadata.label: Band
metadata.wrap:
key.wrap = <dt>|</dt>
value.if.value.field = type
value.if.equals = volume
value.required = 1
value.wrap = <dd>|</dd>

metadata.label: Ausgabe
metadata.wrap:
key.wrap = <dt>|</dt>
value.if.value.field = type
value.if.equals = issue
value.required = 1
value.wrap = <dd>|</dd>

metadata.label: VD16
metadata.wrap:
key.wrap = <dt>|</dt>
value.setContentToCurrent = 1
value.required = 1
value.typolink.parameter.current = 1
value.typolink.parameter.rawUrlEncode = 1
value.typolink.parameter.prepend = TEXT
value.typolink.parameter.prepend.value =
                    http://gateway-bayern.bib-bvb.de/aleph-cgi/bvb_suche?sid=VD16&find_code_1=WVD&find_request_1=
value.wrap = <dd>[|]</dd>

metadata.label: VD17
metadata.wrap:
key.wrap = <dt>|</dt>
value.setContentToCurrent = 1
value.required = 1
value.typolink.parameter.current = 1
value.typolink.parameter.rawUrlEncode = 1
value.typolink.parameter.prepend = TEXT
value.typolink.parameter.prepend.value = http://gso.gbv.de/xslt/DB=1.28/SET=1/TTL=1/CMD?ACT=SRCHA&IKT=8002&TRM=
value.wrap = <dd>[|]</dd>

metadata_formats.xpath: concat(./mods:originInfo[@eventType="production" or @eventType="publication" or not(./mods:edition="[Electronic ed.]")]/mods:dateCreated[@point="start"]," ",./mods:originInfo[@eventType="production" or @eventType="publication" or not(./mods:edition="[Electronic ed.]")]/mods:dateCreated[@point="end"])

concat(./mods:originInfo[@eventType="production" or @eventType="publication" or not(./mods:edition="[Electronic ed.]")]/mods:dateIssued[@point="start"]," ",./mods:originInfo[@eventType="production" or @eventType="publication" or not(./mods:edition="[Electronic ed.]")]/mods:dateIssued[@point="end"])

metadata_subentries.label: Entstehungszeit (Verlauf)
metadata_subentries.wrap:
key.wrap = <dt>|</dt>
value.trim = 1
value.required = 1
value.replacement.1.search = /(\s)/
value.replacement.1.replace = $1-$1
value.replacement.1.useRegExp = 1
value.replacement.2.search = /([0-9]{4})-([0-1]?[0-9])-([0-3]?[0-9])/
value.replacement.2.replace = $3.$2.$1
value.replacement.2.useRegExp = 1
value.orderedStdWrap {
                    10.noTrimWrap = ||, |
                    20.substring = 0,-2
                    }
value.wrap = <dd>|</dd>

metadata_subentries.label: Erscheinungszeit (Verlauf)
metadata_subentries.wrap:
key.wrap = <dt>|</dt>
value.trim = 1
value.required = 1
value.replacement.1.search = /(\s)/
value.replacement.1.replace = $1-$1
value.replacement.1.useRegExp = 1
value.replacement.2.search = /([0-9]{4})-([0-1]?[0-9])-([0-3]?[0-9])/
value.replacement.2.replace = $3.$2.$1
value.replacement.2.useRegExp = 1
value.orderedStdWrap {
                    10.noTrimWrap = ||, |
                    20.substring = 0,-2
                    }
value.wrap = <dd>|</dd>
